case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. VS. ANDY V. LU et al

docket_entries.description: WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A.

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THR 15, INCL.
